title: While we wait to live, life passes. Nothing is ours, Lucilius, except  | Seneca
description:
You protect your wallet but give your hours away for free. What are you waiting for permission to finally start? Tell me below.

#stoicism #seneca #time #stoicwisdom #philosophy #mindset #discipline #memento mori #selfimprovement #stoicquotes
quote: While we wait to live, life passes. Nothing is ours, Lucilius, except time alone.
author: Seneca
